comment: Canonical support-target manifest. Maturity, exact runtime scope, owned native gates, and release-required evidence derive from here. Gate ids must exist in validation/backends/evidence.json. releaseGates maps gate id to the release evidence directory name passed to check-native-evidence.py; an empty map means the target is not release-enforced yet.

web-firefox-webkit.scope: Firefox and WebKit via Playwright engines on Linux

react-native-android.scope: React Native on a reset Android emulator via Appium UiAutomator2

compose-android.scope: Jetpack Compose on a reset Android emulator via Appium UiAutomator2

flutter-ios.scope: Flutter on the iOS simulator via flutter drive

swiftui-ios.scope: SwiftUI on the iOS simulator via Appium XCUITest

windows-desktop.scope: Native x86_64 Windows UIA on WPF, Avalonia, and WinUI 3

linux-desktop.scope: x86_64 Linux containers with AT-SPI on GTK, Qt, QML, and wxWidgets

tui.scope: Terminal UIs on a real PTY with the VT parser

electron.scope: Packaged Electron applications on Linux workers
